screening.rationale: NSF’s Engineering Biological and Biomedical Systems program is plausibly relevant to computational biophysics and biomolecular modeling, especially work on biological/biomedical systems, simulation, and AI-assisted analysis. The applicant type is compatible with an academic researcher. The posting is an NSF program announcement, but no specific deadline is given in the record; since NSF program announcements can support recurring/ongoing submissions depending on the solicitation, this is still a plausible fit, though the lack of a usable due date lowers confidence.
